description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular design with a pronounced central ridge running from the top to the chin, giving it a medieval or fantasy-inspired appearance. The front faceplate is sharply contoured, with a grid of rectangular ventilation slits on either side of the mouth area, and a pointed chin guard. The sides of the helmet are reinforced and curve smoothly to cover the ears, while the rear is rounded and extends downward to protect the back of the head and neck. A prominent fin-like crest runs along the top, adding both structural strength and visual distinction. The surface is uniformly dark, with a matte, slightly worn finish, and no visible branding, graphics, or decorative elements.
description: A dark, angular helmet with a central crest, grid-like vents on the faceplate, and a matte, worn finish. The design is robust and protective, with no visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed faceplate, central ridge, and grid-like vents on either side of the mouth.
description_view_1: Front-left angle highlights the angular faceplate, side reinforcement, and the helmet's rounded rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back and the prominent central crest running from top to bottom.
description_view_3: Front-right angle reveals the side curvature, faceplate structure, and the helmet's overall bulk.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two rectangular grids of vertical slits on either side of the mouth area on the faceplate.
